subtitle.ja: 輪を好きな長さになるように重ねます。輪に両手の人差し指と中指を入れます
subtitle.en: Adjust the loops to the desired length by stacking them. Insert both index fingers and middle fingers into the loops.

subtitle.ja: 左手の人差し指と中指をこちら側に1回転させて糸をねじります
subtitle.en: Rotate the left index finger and middle finger one full turn toward you, twisting the string.

subtitle.ja: 右手人差し指手前側の糸を左手で持ち、左手の輪の中から引き出します
subtitle.en: With the left hand, take the near string on the right index finger and pull it out through the loop on the left hand.

subtitle.ja: 左手から外した糸を右手で持ち、右手の輪の中から引き出します
subtitle.en: With the right hand, take the string removed from the left hand and pull it out through the loop on the right hand.

subtitle.ja: 両手を強く引いて完成です
subtitle.en: Pull both hands firmly to finish.
